The Exorcist: Believer (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $65,537,395Details
International Box Office $71,460,674
Worldwide Box Office $136,998,069
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,411,134
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,230,276
Total $3,641,410
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When his daughter, Angela, and her friend Katherine, show signs of demonic possession, it unleashes a chain of events that forces single father Victor Fielding to confront the nadir of evil. Terrified and desperate, he seeks out Chris MacNeil, the only person alive who’s witnessed anything like it before.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$26,497,600 (40.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,663 opening theaters/3,684 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $71,647,827

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 6th, 2023 (Wide) by Universal
October 6th, 2023 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: October 4th, 2023 (Wide) (Indonesia)
October 4th, 2023 (Wide) (Philippines)
October 5th, 2023 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
October 5th, 2023 (Wide), released as El exorcista: Creyentes (Peru)
October 5th, 2023 (Wide), released as El exorcista: Creyentes (Central America)
Video Release: October 24th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for some violent content, disturbing images, language and sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2795 (cert #54583), 8/9/2023)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Franchise: Exorcist
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Reboot
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Georgia, United States
Plot point: Demons, Possessed
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Universal Pictures, Morgan Creek Productions, Rough House Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
